//@version=6
strategy("Project Montauk Candidate - RSI Regime",
     overlay=true,
     shorttitle="RSI Regime",
     initial_capital=1000,
     default_qty_type=strategy.percent_of_equity,
     default_qty_value=100,
     pyramiding=0,
     commission_type=strategy.commission.percent,
     commission_value=0.05,
     slippage=0,
     calc_on_every_tick=false,
     process_orders_on_close=true)

// Generated by scripts/pine_generator.py
// Source strategy family: rsi_regime

rsiLen       = input.int(13, "RSI Length", minval=1, group="1 - Inputs")
entryRsi     = input.float(35.0, "Entry RSI", step=1.0, group="1 - Inputs")
exitRsi      = input.float(80.0, "Exit RSI", step=1.0, group="1 - Inputs")
panicRsi     = input.float(15.0, "Panic RSI", step=1.0, group="1 - Inputs")
trendLen     = input.int(150, "Trend EMA Length", minval=1, group="1 - Inputs")
cooldownBars = input.int(5, "Cooldown Bars", minval=0, group="1 - Inputs")

rsiVal   = ta.rsi(close, rsiLen)
trendEma = ta.ema(close, trendLen)

entrySignal = ta.crossover(rsiVal, entryRsi) and (na(trendEma) or close > trendEma)
isOverboughtExit = strategy.position_size > 0 and rsiVal >= exitRsi
isPanicExit      = strategy.position_size > 0 and rsiVal < panicRsi
exitCond         = isOverboughtExit or isPanicExit

var string exitReason = na
if strategy.position_size > 0
    if isOverboughtExit
        exitReason := "RSI Overbought"
    else if isPanicExit
        exitReason := "RSI Panic"

var int lastSellBar = na
if exitCond
    strategy.close("Long")
    lastSellBar := bar_index
    label.new(bar_index, high, exitReason, yloc=yloc.abovebar, style=label.style_label_down, color=color.orange, textcolor=color.white, size=size.tiny)

canEnter = strategy.position_size == 0 and (na(lastSellBar) or (bar_index - lastSellBar) > cooldownBars)
if entrySignal and canEnter and not exitCond
    strategy.entry("Long", strategy.long)

plot(trendEma, "Trend EMA", color=color.new(color.blue, 40))
